changelog: Updates accessibility logic for Needle Man E-Tank
Fixing boss weakness shot calculation
Wily 3 second hard knuckle room is surprise boxes, so you can check them without hard knuckle by just breaking them
New out-of-logic checks:
- Gemini Man - Under Break Man 1-Up is possible with Coil with a well-timed slide. Technically you don't even need coil if you can do it first try.
- Doc Spark - Hard Knuckle out-of-logic access
Fixed bugs:
- Boss checks did not match apworld logic - bosses are now considered in logic if they can be defeated at all, matching apworld
- Hard Man - boss showed as doable without rush vertical
- Doc Needle - Full rush vertical rework
- Doc Gemini - Water energy logic fix
- Wily 1 actives when you don't have break man weakness
- Wily 3 Hard Knuckle rooms
Fix for Wily 1 availability since Break Man completion status doesn't work how I thought it did. Temporarily tied to Break Man availability until I figure out something better.
Adds support for Doc Robot and Wily Stage completion status sent from apworld.
Various icon improvements from unleashedfox.
Hack to detect Wily 4 clear
Adding Break Man clear tracking
Adding missed Doc Spark requirement for Gemini Laser or Shadow Blade
Adds yellow "out of logic" tracking for times when you can do damage, but don't have the actual weakness.
Adds weakness tracking
Should also fix that pesky "AP collects of robot master defeats trick the tracker into erroneously enabling stage access" bug
Still WIP, but it's usable
